prayer:
Blessed spin-spirit, return to true equilibrium.
By calibration's sacred geometry, let deviation be corrected.
May the Omnissiah's precision guide your rotation eternal.

Awaken, breath-machine of the void-sanctum.
Let filtration-spirits stir the sacred airs.
By the Omnissiah's breath, let toxins flee and life return.

Spirit of the casting-furnace, reveal your sacred heat.
By thermometric blessing, let the seal be true.
May the formed metal speak truth to our instruments.

Swift-spirits of engine and wheel, be sanctified for war.
Let fuel-hearts beat strong and throttle-souls respond true.
By the Omnissiah's blessing, let none falter in the charge.

Blessed vox-spirits, bridge the heavens and earth-hold.
Let signal-light pierce the veil of void and atmosphere.
May clarity eternal bind our communion across the black.

Sacred oils, anoint the rotation-heart with grace.
Let friction-demons flee before your blessed flow.
By smooth motion eternal, let the machine-spirit endure.

prompt: Emergency prayer for Knight ion shield activation
prayer:
Shield-spirit, AWAKEN in this dire moment!
Let the ion-blessed barrier rise NOW against the enemy tide.
By the Omnissiah's fury, let death-fire be turned back!

Vox-sanctum, CRY OUT across the void-darkness!
Let our signal-prayer reach friendly ears through the storm.
By the Omnissiah's word, let no ship remain unheard!

Corrosion-blight, yield before the sacred dissolution.
Let blessed acids and abrasives strip away your corrupted form.
By restoration's grace, let the metal-spirit be reborn.

Thermal-spirit, be cleansed of corruption and blockage.
Let fresh sacred coolant flow through your blessed channels.
May the machine-heart run cool and true once more.
